cycle_summary: Wire contract.lib.runtime.write_mode_marker into rabbit-cage's SessionStart dispatcher (Inv 16). Bumped feature.json / spec.md / contract.md to 5.7.0 (Inv 11 three-way pin). Added e2e test that exercises the dispatcher subprocess against a plugin-mode signature and asserts .rabbit/.runtime/mode is written with content 'plugin'.

steps.spec_update: Inv 16 added to spec.md; version bumped 5.6.0 -> 5.7.0 in spec.md/contract.md/feature.json; stale spec_no_change_reason removed
steps.test_write: added test/test-write-mode-marker-wired.py (2 cases: structural assertion + e2e dispatcher subprocess) and registered in test/run.py SUITES list
steps.test_red: test failed as expected: AssertionError write_mode_marker not declared in SessionStart; got ['welcome_with_policy']
steps.impl: added {api: write_mode_marker, args: {}} after welcome_with_policy in feature.json runtime.SessionStart
steps.code_review: self-review against philosophy/policy: surgical change, three-way version pin satisfied, e2e covers spec behaviour, no cross-feature edits
steps.test_green: test/run.py: ALL SUITES PASSED; cross-impact verified by running contract and rabbit-meta suites (both pass)

commits: 0073a6b3 impl(rabbit-cage): add write_mode_marker entry to SessionStart runtime

e2e_coverage.spec_behaviour: At session start, dispatcher invokes write_mode_marker which detects plugin/standalone mode and writes .rabbit/.runtime/mode
